response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, along with extensive backend and architecture work using PostgreSQL alternatives (MongoDB, SQL) and Kubernetes. His experience in energy/construction-adjacent projects (GISCollective) and AI-agent infrastructure aligns well with the role. However, his recent work in unrelated domains (direct mail automation) and lack of PostgreSQL experience slightly detracts from the fit.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles
Strong system architecture and scalability experience (Kubernetes, microservices, low-latency apps)
Proven ability to lead and innovate (founded GISCollective, contributed to open-source tools)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB/SQL alternatives)
Recent work in direct mail automation may not translate directly to energy/construction tech
Senior-level experience may overshadow the entry-level role requirements
